channel.title: Deeptech Daily
channel.description: A short daily briefing on deeptech, robotics, and space startups.
channel.itunes:author: Deeptech Daily

item.title: Rocket Lab Scores NASA Triple-Launch Deal + UGV Startup Goes to War
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Friday, June 26, 2026, and we've got a packed show today — rockets, robots, and some genuinely interesting AI bets. Let's get into it.
First up, Rocket Lab just landed a significant NASA contract to fly three Electron rockets in 2027, carrying a...

item.title: Agility Robotics Goes Public + China's Reusable Rocket Debut
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Thursday, June 25, 2026, and we've got a packed show today covering humanoid robots going public, China's next big rocket move, and a new satellite defense partnership you're going to want to hear about. Let's get into it.
Okay, the biggest story...

item.title: SpaceX's Secret Reentry Capsule + Agility Robotics Goes Public
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Wednesday, June 24, 2026, and we've got a packed show today — a secretive SpaceX mission, a big robotics IPO, and a drone startup that just raised half a billion euros. Let's get into it.
So the story everyone's been buzzing about is SpaceX's...
